title: cassia mayana
intro: Cassia mayana is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the "Saphron tree" due to its vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Central and South America, for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Cassia mayana have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and lowering blood sugar levels. Cassia mayana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a natural remedy in traditional medicine for various health conditions.
